privileged_info_summary: The task relies entirely on synthetically generated media and text files created during setup. It is verified that the remediation instructions require shifting the audio by -1500 ms (to correct a 1.5s trail) and the subtitles by +2000 ms (to correct a 2.0s early appearance), placing the new subtitle start time exactly at 00:00:03. The required skills and tags align with the expected media processing, deinterlacing, and container muxing tasks.
